violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of fries were stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet cloths were stored on the cutting board of the prep cooler and counter. Need to be stored in sanitizer solution when not in use.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Shelves in the walk in cooler by the door are rusty and no longer a cleanable surface.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The handle to the freezer door of the white fridge has duct tape on it.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor under, and behind, the cooking equipment and wall by the steam table need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile under the dishwasher, by the stove, and in the back stockroom.
